---
title: "Elements"
description: "Detailed geometry, fields, placement, and validation for OPALX element models."
audience: physics
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

This chapter documents element models whose geometry, field support, or
runtime semantics require more than the generic placement conventions.

{{< include bend.qmd >}}

{{< include multipole.qmd >}}
